simple_types.name: Conversion_Resolution
simple_types.code: type Conversion_Resolution is (Res_12bit, Res_16bit, Res_10bit, Res_8bit);

simple_types.name: Negative_Selection
simple_types.code:
type Negative_Selection is (AIN0, AIN1, AIN2, AIN3, AIN4, AIN5, AIN6, AIN7,
                            GND);

simple_types.name: Positive_Selection
simple_types.code: type Positive_Selection is (AIN0, AIN1, AIN2, AIN3, AIN4, AIN5, AIN6, AIN7, …, DAC);

simple_types.name: Prescaler_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Prescaler_Kind is (Pre_2, Pre_4, Pre_8, Pre_16,
                        Pre_32, Pre_64, Pre_128, Pre_256);

simple_types.name: Reference_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Reference_Kind is (Internal_Bandgap, Half_VDDANA, VDDANA,
                        External_A, External_B, External_C);

tagged_types.name: ADC_Device

subprograms.name: Configure
Conversion_Done
subprograms.code: function Conversion_Done (This : in out ADC_Device) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if the conversion is done

subprograms.name: Result
subprograms.code: function Result (This : in out ADC_Device) return HAL.UInt16

documentation.description: Return the result of a conversion

subprograms.name: Set_Inputs

documentation.description: Set the negative and positive inputs for the conversion
